series_metadata.series_title: Weekly invoice for Racinos (VLSA) from the central monitoring system and other documents
series_metadata.series_description: Invoice sent to each Video Lottery Sales Agent (Racino) venue weekly to inform them of the electronic funds transfer sweep. Associated support documents include Expired Voucher funds, Intercepted funds, Licensing Fees, Racino Fines, and VEP confiscated funds.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for two (2) years, review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
